hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) d=$(dirname "$f"); raw=$(golangci-lint run "$d" --output.text.print-issued-lines=false --output.text.colors=false 2>&1); if printf '%s\n' "$raw" | grep -q '(typecheck)'; then out="$raw"; else out=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | grep -F "${f#"$PWD/"}" || true); fi; if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg ctx "golangci-lint found issues in ${f#"$PWD/"}:
$out" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; exit 2; fi;; esac; }
